description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a dark metallic frame and a wooden-textured grip, accompanied by a detached magazine and several loose cartridges. The handgun features a rectangular slide with subtle machining details and a rounded barrel protruding slightly from the front. The grip is smooth with a rich brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal of the rest of the firearm. The magazine is box-shaped and appears to be made of metal, matching the finish of the slide. The bullets are metallic with copper-colored tips, indicating standard full metal jacket rounds. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal embellishments and a focus on functionality.
description: A dark metallic semi-automatic handgun with a smooth wooden grip, shown with a detached magazine and several loose bullets.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from the side, highlighting the wooden grip, the detached magazine, and several bullets lying nearby.
description_view_1: This angle shows the top and side of the handgun, with the barrel and ejection port visible, as well as the magazine and bullets in the foreground.
description_view_2: A side view emphasizing the length of the slide and barrel, with the grip and magazine partially visible and bullets scattered around.
description_view_3: The rear and grip of the handgun are most prominent, showing the smooth wooden texture and the magazine lying beside it.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is rectangular with gently rounded edges and a smooth, polished wooden finish. It lacks visible checkering or stippling, presenting a clean, classic appearance. The wood grain is subtly visible, adding a touch of elegance to the otherwise utilitarian design. There are no finger grooves, logos, or embellishments, and the grip appears ergonomically contoured for a comfortable hold.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, untextured surface with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and there are no visible reinforcements or integrated accessories. The design is simple and functional, blending seamlessly with the frame.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, cylindrical, and protrudes slightly from the front of the slide. It has a smooth, matte black finish with no visible threading, porting, or compensator features. There are no external markings or fluting on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unadorned, lacking manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and rectangular with slightly beveled edges. It is made of metal and matches the matte black finish of the handgun. There are no finger rests, logos, or texturing, giving it a simple and utilitarian appearance.
